caption: A man is seated in a recording studio against a background of black acoustic foam panels. He wears a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a red and black logo on the front, and black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone, labeled with the "Blue" logo, is positioned in front of him on a boom arm. In the initial moments, the man is gesturing with both hands while speaking, with his left hand moving across the frame. As the scene progresses, he lowers his arms and settles into a more stationary position, focusing his gaze slightly to the side while continuing to speak into the microphone. A tattoo is visible on his right upper arm throughout the sequence. The environment remains static, with no changes to the lighting or the equipment.
